objects.description: [APT-C-36](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0099) has used DDNS services such as DuckDNS, noip[.]com, and con-ip[.]com to redirect victims to sites or repositories hosting malware implants.(Citation: Kaspersky BlindEagle AUG 2024)(Citation: Check Point Blind Eagle MAR 2025)(Citation: LevelBlue Blind Eagle Proton66 JUN 2025)(Citation: Recorded Future TAG-144 AUG 2025)(Citation: Zscaler BlindEagle DEC 2025)
